zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington於1422年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛克時，她的父親Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston45歲，母親Margaret De Gresley29歲。她於大約1434年與Thomas Bellingham在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓結婚。她去世於1466年在英國萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德享年44歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington于1422年出生在英国武斯特斯爾洛克时，她的父亲Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston45岁，母亲Margaret De Gresley29岁。她于大约1434年与Thomas Bellingham在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓结婚。她去世于1466年在英国萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德享年44岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington was born in 1422, in Rock, Worcestershire, England, her father, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, was 45 and her mother, Margaret De Gresley, was 29. She married Thomas Bellingham about 1434, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. She died in 1466, in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington est née en 1422, à Rock, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Gresley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bellingham environ 1434, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington 1422 in Rock, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston 45 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Gresley 29. Sie hat um 1434 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England Thomas Bellingham geheiratet. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Bellingham circa 1434, nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. Morì nel 1466, nel Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatingtonが1422年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアロックで生まれた時，父Thomas Blount Baronet Elvastonは45歳，母Margaret De Gresleyは29歳であった。約1434年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンでThomas Bellinghamと結婚した。彼女は1466年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスタウントン ハロルドで44歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington(이)가 1422년 영국 워스스터실르 록에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Gresley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 Thomas Bellingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 레이스스터실르 스타운턴 하로드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 키더민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington nasceu em 1422, em Rock, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Gresley, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bellingham aproximadamente 1434, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington родилась в 1422 г. в местности рокк, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Gresley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bellingham около 1434 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности стаунтон харолд, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Bellingham aproximadamente 1434, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
